description_long: This is a wooden baseball bat with a cylindrical shape that tapers from a thick barrel to a narrower handle. The barrel end is tightly wrapped with metallic barbed wire, giving it a rugged and menacing appearance, and some areas show dark stains that may suggest wear or use. The wood grain is visible along the length of the bat, with a natural brown coloration and a slightly glossy finish. The handle is smooth and unwrapped, ending in a rounded knob for grip. There are no visible brand logos, grip tape, or decorative markings on the bat. The overall look is utilitarian and intimidating, suitable for both sports and improvised defensive scenarios.
description: A wooden baseball bat with a barbed wire-wrapped barrel, visible wood grain, and a smooth, unwrapped handle. The bat has a rugged, worn appearance with no visible logos or markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bat, highlighting the barbed wire-wrapped barrel and the smooth wooden handle.
description_view_1: End-on view of the barrel, emphasizing the circular cross-section and dense barbed wire wrapping.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the barbed wire on the barrel and the tapering wooden handle.
description_view_3: Handle-end view, focusing on the rounded knob and the transition to the barbed wire-wrapped barrel.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end cap is simply the rounded end of the wooden bat, with no distinct cap, markings, or additional materials.
